skills.name: AI Doctor
skills.description: Diagnose endpoint health, rank risks, and propose a safe module order.

skills.name: NEO - Neural Execution Operator
skills.description: Conversational operator with snapshot awareness, local model fallback, skill catalog, and confirmed action execution.

skills.name: NEO Script Forge
skills.description: Generate signed-audit PowerShell or CMD maintenance scripts with dry-run defaults, SHA-256 metadata, and rollback notes.

skills.name: Safe Care
skills.description: Balanced cleanup, memory care, disk scan, and TRIM/defrag workflow.

skills.name: Deep Diagnostics
skills.description: Check boot, WinRE, services, event logs, disk, and Windows component health.

skills.name: NEO Windows Doctor
skills.description: Correlate diagnostics, anomaly scoring, AI plan, MCP context, NullClaw bridge, and repair recommendations.

skills.name: Windows Error Fix
skills.description: Run conservative Windows repair only after review and explicit confirmation.

skills.name: Integrity Scan
skills.description: Audit endpoint policy, local files, agent status, and safety posture.

skills.name: Secure Update Manager
skills.description: Credential-gated update with SHA-256 verification and automatic repair.

skills.name: Rollback Guard
skills.description: Restore the latest local safety snapshot when a treatment regresses endpoint health.

mcp_connectors.name: RMM Control Plane
mcp_connectors.description: Dispatch signed safety manifests and receive endpoint telemetry.

mcp_connectors.name: Supabase Mirror
mcp_connectors.description: Mirror safety events, action logs, and fleet state for realtime analytics.

mcp_connectors.name: Hugging Face Spaces
mcp_connectors.description: Optional hosted model registry and cloud inference endpoint.

mcp_connectors.name: E2B Sandbox
mcp_connectors.description: Preflight script simulation before risky rollout.

mcp_connectors.name: NullClaw Local Operator
mcp_connectors.description: Local low-level assistant used only through explicit operator actions.

mcp_connectors.name: OpenFang Bridge
mcp_connectors.description: Security audit and operator bridge for safe command recommendations.

mcp_connectors.name: Ollama / Local Model
mcp_connectors.description: Offline local AI model for interactive diagnosis and operator guidance.

mcp_connectors.name: NEO MCP Bridge
mcp_connectors.description: Local read-only bridge that inventories skills, connectors, tools, and runtime readiness for NEO.
